metadata.description: Real-time change comprehension, Bayesian trust scoring, and information-gain decision support for Claude Code.

plugins.name: full
plugins.description: Meta-plugin. One install pulls in all 4 Crow plugins via dependency resolution.

plugins.name: change-tracker
plugins.description: Tracks every file change with semantic diff compression and change classification.

plugins.name: trust-scorer
plugins.description: Bayesian trust scoring of each change with prior-based confidence and posterior updates.

plugins.name: decision-gate
plugins.description: Per-change review with information-gain ordering and adversarial self-review for low-trust changes.

plugins.name: session-memory
plugins.description: Session continuity graph for compaction survival. Preserves decision history and learned preferences.
